source: Anthropic Claude API and Claude Code Enterprise
method: Official Anthropic Claude Platform pricing, models overview, model deprecations, release notes, Claude pricing, and Enterprise Help Center pages. Active and still-callable deprecated first-party API models are included; retired models are excluded. See claude-code.method.md.

models.notes: Generally available since June 9, 2026. 1M context at standard pricing. Adaptive thinking is always on. Requires 30-day data retention and is not eligible for zero data retention. Anthropic restored access after a temporary interruption.

Limited availability to approved Project Glasswing customers; no self-serve signup. Same specs and prices as Fable 5, without Fable's safety classifiers. 1M context, always-on adaptive thinking, mandatory 30-day retention, and no zero-data-retention eligibility. Successor to the retired Claude Mythos Preview.
1M context at standard pricing. Fast mode is available in research preview on the Claude API; prompt-cache and data-residency multipliers apply on top of fast pricing.
1M context at standard pricing. The model remains active; only its fast mode is scheduled for removal on July 24, 2026.
1M context at standard pricing. Fast mode was removed June 29, 2026; speed='fast' now runs and bills at standard speed and rates.
Active first-party Claude API model. Anthropic's published tentative retirement is not sooner than November 24, 2026.
Still callable on the collection date but deprecated; Anthropic recommends Claude Opus 4.8. Remove after the scheduled August 5, 2026 retirement.
Launched June 30, 2026. Stored top-level values are the active introductory prices through August 31, 2026. 1M context at standard/promo token rates.
Active first-party Claude API model with 1M context at standard pricing.
Active first-party Claude API model. Anthropic's published tentative retirement is not sooner than September 29, 2026.
Active first-party Claude API model. Anthropic's published tentative retirement is not sooner than October 15, 2026.

claude_code_enterprise.usage_billing: All Claude, Claude Code, and Cowork usage is billed from the first token at standard Claude API rates on top of the seat fee.
claude_code_enterprise.usage_limits: No plan-level or seat-level usage cap; administrators can set organization and user spend limits.
claude_code_enterprise.sales_assisted_options: Invoicing, HIPAA-readiness/BAA, dedicated customer success, and multi-currency support are available through sales.
claude_code_enterprise.legacy_note: Chat/Chat + Claude Code and Standard/Premium seat types are legacy and unavailable for new contracts; they transition to the single Enterprise seat at renewal.

pricing_modifiers.us_only_inference_applies_to: Claude Opus 4.6, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and later models; global routing is standard price.

plan_notes: The direct API list prices in models[] are the token rates used by current Claude Code Enterprise usage billing. Enterprise adds a $20/user/month access seat billed annually; the seat includes Claude Code but no token allowance. Enterprise volume discounts and custom terms may be negotiated through sales. Claude Sonnet 5 top-level prices are its active introductory promotion; standard post-promotion prices are retained in the same row. Output tokens, including thinking tokens, use the single output rate.
